name: Chicken and Artichoke Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 2 jars marinated artichoke hearts, 6 oz each, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichoke hearts and set them aside. In a large skillet, combine the marinade and butter over low heat for 10 minutes.
2. Coat chicken pieces in flour. Brown the chicken in the butter mixture over medium-high heat.
3. Transfer browned chicken to a 13x9-inch baking dish, keeping the butter mixture in the skillet.
4. Sauté onion and remaining ingredients (mushrooms, garlic, oregano, rosemary, basil) in the reserved butter mixture until vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in the drained artichoke hearts, tomatoes, salt, and pepper to taste. Pour the tomato mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 50 minutes. Remove cover and pour Madeira wine over the chicken; cover again and bake an additional 10 minutes.
7. Cook linguine according to package directions, then drain well.
8. Serve cacciatore over cooked linguine.
